detail.description: Jhostynxon Garcia flies out to center fielder Kody Clemens.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds out, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch.
Jhostynxon Garcia singles on a soft ground ball to second baseman Nico Hoerner.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds out, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch.
Jhostynxon Garcia lines out sharply to center fielder Kevin Alcántara.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds out, shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Pedro Ramírez to first baseman Michael Busch. Konnor Griffin out at 2nd. Jhostynxon Garcia out at 1st.
Jhostynxon Garcia singles on a line drive to left fielder Nathan Church. Konnor Griffin to 3rd. Endy Rodríguez to 2nd.
Jhostynxon Garcia singles on a ground ball to center fielder Victor Scott II. Konnor Griffin scores. Endy Rodríguez to 2nd.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Jhostynxon Garcia singles on a ground ball to left fielder Nathan Church.
Jhostynxon Garcia pops out to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Jhostynxon Garcia pops out to first baseman Alec Burleson in foul territory.
Jhostynxon Garcia flies out to right fielder Myles Straw.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds out softly, pitcher Adam Macko to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Jhostynxon Garcia singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango. Spencer Horwitz to 2nd.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds out, shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Jhostynxon Garcia singles on a ground ball to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango.
Jhostynxon Garcia lines out to shortstop Andrés Giménez.
Jhostynxon Garcia doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake Meyers. Oneil Cruz scores.
Jhostynxon Garcia flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.
Jhostynxon Garcia reaches on a fielder's choice out, third baseman Isaac Paredes to catcher Christian Vázquez. Oneil Cruz out at home.
Jhostynxon Garcia flies out to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
Jhostynxon Garcia grounds out, third baseman Austin Riley to first baseman Matt Olson.
Jhostynxon Garcia lines out to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.
